title: Zeboron Gamma
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zeboron Gamma''' was a building located on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Shador]], in the burrough of [[Fink's Hole]]. A [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] occupied the first level, with a public dormitory above. The [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Taslo Deville]] lived in [[Zeboron Gamma 452]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''
